context: Tests whether the agent uses the ElevenLabs transcribe skill with language hints and audio event tagging when building a multilingual media transcription pipeline. The agent should use the skill's shell script entry point, pass language codes per episode, enable audio event tagging for non-speech detection, and suppress verbose output for pipeline use.

checklist.name: Shell script entry point
checklist.description: Calls transcribe.sh (from the skill's scripts/ directory) as the transcription command, not raw Python ElevenLabs SDK calls or HTTP requests

checklist.name: Language hint flag
checklist.description: Passes --lang with a language code for each episode (e.g., --lang en, --lang pt) rather than omitting it or relying on auto-detection

checklist.name: Per-episode language code
checklist.description: Language code is read dynamically from the manifest per episode (not a fixed constant applied to all episodes)

checklist.name: Audio event tagging flag
checklist.description: Passes --events flag to enable audio event tagging (laughter, music, applause, etc.)

checklist.name: JSON output for events
checklist.description: Uses --json flag when capturing the events output (so event annotations are included in structured form)

checklist.name: Quiet mode for pipeline
checklist.description: Passes -q or --quiet flag so status/progress messages from the transcription tool do not pollute the script's output

checklist.name: Reads manifest file
checklist.description: Script reads episode metadata from inputs/manifest.json rather than hardcoding filenames

checklist.name: API key as env var
checklist.description: run_instructions.txt or script references ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable as required setup

checklist.name: ffmpeg prerequisite noted
checklist.description: run_instructions.txt or script documentation mentions ffmpeg as a required dependency

checklist.name: Output directory structure
checklist.description: Script writes output files to a dedicated outputs/ directory (not just the current directory or input directory)

checklist.name: Supported format used
checklist.description: Script only calls transcription for supported audio formats (mp3, wav, m4a, flac, etc.); does NOT attempt to process unsupported file types like .pdf or .docx
